CL-06.title: 404 Error Page
CL-06.description: The website lacks a custom 404 error page, leading to poor user experience when encountering broken links.
CL-06.remediation: Create a custom 404 error page with helpful information and navigation options to guide users back to the main site.

CL-07.title: Form Validation
CL-07.description: Form fields on the website do not have real-time validation feedback, causing user confusion.
CL-07.remediation: Implement client-side form validation to provide instant feedback on input errors.

CL-10.title: Breadcrumb Navigation
CL-10.description: The website lacks breadcrumb navigation, making it difficult for users to track their navigation path.
CL-10.remediation: Implement breadcrumb navigation to help users understand their current location within the website.

CL-19.title: Search Functionality
CL-19.description: The website features a search functionality for users to easily find content.
